to scan, i.e. look intently at; by implication, to regard with pleasure, favor or care
an arising
the heart; also used (figuratively) very widely for the feelings, the will and even the intellect; likewise for the centre of anything
a covering (in a bad sense), i.e. blindness or obduracy
to give, used with greatest latitude of application (put, make, etc.)
an imprecation
wormwood (regarded as poisonous, and therefore accursed)
a bitter herb
to slake the thirst (occasionally of other appetites)
to sate, i.e. fill to satisfaction (literally or figuratively)
refuse
refuse (as swept off)
a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock
properly, the nearest part, i.e. the center, whether literal, figurative or adverbial (especially with preposition)
to put (used in a great variety of applications, literal, figurative, inferentially, and elliptically)

45.struct: contains a main verb; prepositional phrase(s)

tokens.range: a contrivance, i.e. (concretely) a texture, machine, or (abstractly) intention, plan (whether bad, a plot; or good, advice)
avengement, whether the act of the passion
to see, literally or figuratively (in numerous applications, direct and implied, transitive, intransitive and causative)
to be (causatively, make) bitter (or unpleasant); (figuratively) to rebel (or resist; causatively, to provoke)
we
to forgive
to break away (from just authority), i.e. trespass, apostatize, quarrel
properly, to entwine as ascreen; by implication, to fence in, cover over, (figuratively) protect
to cross over; used very widely of any transition (literal or figurative; transitive, intransitive, intensive, causative); specifically, to cover (in copulation)
a cloud (as covering the sky), i.e. the nimbus or thunder-cloud
intercession, supplication; by implication, a hymn
a (sudden) alarm (properly, the object feared, by implication, the feeling)
a pit, especially forcatching animals
devastation
a fracture, figuratively, ruin; specifically, a solution (of a dream)
